'''鈭歜-k-z''' ('''kabakaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:imbed|imbed]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-k-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imbed|imbed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-k-z
|-
! Lemma
| kabakaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibakaz|thibakaz]] || [[word:jibakaz|jibakaz]] || [[word:shibakaz|shibakaz]] || [[word:kibakaz|kibakaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubakaz|thuthubakaz]] || [[word:jujubakaz|jujubakaz]] || [[word:shushubakaz|shushubakaz]] || [[word:kukubakaz|kukubakaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubakaz|thubakaz]] || [[word:jubakaz|jubakaz]] || [[word:shubakaz|shubakaz]] || [[word:kubakaz|kubakaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubakaz|thubakaz]] || [[word:jubakaz|jubakaz]] || [[word:shubakaz|shubakaz]] || [[word:kubakaz|kubakaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebakaz|thebakaz]] || [[word:jebakaz|jebakaz]] || [[word:shebakaz|shebakaz]] || [[word:kebakaz|kebakaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobakaz|thothobakaz]] || [[word:jojobakaz|jojobakaz]] || [[word:shoshobakaz|shoshobakaz]] || [[word:kokobakaz|kokobakaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobakaz|thobakaz]] || [[word:jobakaz|jobakaz]] || [[word:shobakaz|shobakaz]] || [[word:kobakaz|kobakaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobakaz|thobakaz]] || [[word:jobakaz|jobakaz]] || [[word:shobakaz|shobakaz]] || [[word:kobakaz|kobakaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙bakaz|th忙bakaz]] || [[word:j忙bakaz|j忙bakaz]] || [[word:sh忙bakaz|sh忙bakaz]] || [[word:k忙bakaz|k忙bakaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabakaz|thathabakaz]] || [[word:jajabakaz|jajabakaz]] || [[word:shashabakaz|shashabakaz]] || [[word:kakabakaz|kakabakaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabakaz|thabakaz]] || [[word:jabakaz|jabakaz]] || [[word:shabakaz|shabakaz]] || [[word:kabakaz|kabakaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabakaz|thabakaz]] || [[word:jabakaz|jabakaz]] || [[word:shabakaz|shabakaz]] || [[word:kabakaz|kabakaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabakaz|shabakaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabakaz|goshabakaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabakaz|gokishabakaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabakazn眉|shabakazn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabakaznkn眉|goshabakaznkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabakazn眉|gokishabakazn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabakazsh毛|shabakazsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabakaznksh毛|goshabakaznksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabakazsh毛|gokishabakazsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabakazro|shabakazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabakaznkro|goshabakaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabakazro|gokishabakazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabakazmu|shabakazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabakaznkmu|goshabakaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabakazmu|gokishabakazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabakazsher|shabakazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabakaznksher|goshabakaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabakazsher|gokishabakazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabakazng|shabakazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabakaznkng|goshabakaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabakazng|gokishabakazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabakazya|shabakazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabakaznkya|goshabakaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabakazya|gokishabakazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabakazyam|shabakazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabakaznkyam|goshabakaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabakazyam|gokishabakazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabakazn眉sh毛|shabakazn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabakaznkn眉sh毛|goshabakaznkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabakazn眉sh毛|gokishabakazn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabakazn眉ro|shabakazn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabakaznkn眉ro|goshabakaznkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabakazn眉ro|gokishabakazn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabakazn眉mu|shabakazn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabakaznkn眉mu|goshabakaznkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabakazn眉mu|gokishabakazn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabakazsh毛n眉|shabakazsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabakaznksh毛n眉|goshabakaznksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabakazsh毛n眉|gokishabakazsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabakazsh毛ro|shabakazsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabakaznksh毛ro|goshabakaznksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabakazsh毛ro|gokishabakazsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabakazsh毛mu|shabakazsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabakaznksh毛mu|goshabakaznksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabakazsh毛mu|gokishabakazsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabakazron眉|shabakazron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabakaznkron眉|goshabakaznkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabakazron眉|gokishabakazron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabakazrosh毛|shabakazrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabakaznkrosh毛|goshabakaznkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabakazrosh毛|gokishabakazrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabakazromu|shabakazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabakaznkromu|goshabakaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabakazromu|gokishabakazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabakazmun眉|shabakazmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabakaznkmun眉|goshabakaznkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabakazmun眉|gokishabakazmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabakazmush毛|shabakazmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabakaznkmush毛|goshabakaznkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabakazmush毛|gokishabakazmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabakazmuro|shabakazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabakaznkmuro|goshabakaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabakazmuro|gokishabakazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
